title: Cream Cheese and Chive Cheesecake Bites
description: A bite-sized twist on the classic cheesecake, featuring a cream cheese and chive filling in a crumbly pastry crust.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough and cut into small squares.
Bake the pastry squares for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
Add the egg and mix until combined.
Stir in the chive and sugar.
Place a small spoonful of the cream cheese mixture onto each baked pastry square.
Bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the filling is set.
Allow to cool completely before serving.
